location mutations.

Refactor 929 patterns with topic-specific phrase regexes and domain keywords

Transform 824 top500 concept patterns (440 AU, 432 global) from shared
broad regex templates to topic-specific multi-word phrase regexes built
from each pattern's evidence keywords. Wire 214 patterns to 7 domain
keyword lists for stronger corroborative evidence matching. Fix 44 HR
keyword references to use consolidated industry-hr dictionary. Update
57 non-top500 patterns with domain keyword wiring and phrase embedding.

Key changes per pattern:
- Replace broad (?is)\b(generic|terms)\b regex with topic phrases
- Add keyword_lists references to domain-specific dictionaries
- Gate 65-confidence tier with evidence requirement to reduce FP
- Update operation field to reflect new detection approach

Legend numbers updated to 0-100 scale. Hebrew labels aligned too.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(cli): streaming stall detection, ticker freeze, and error display (#774) (#781)

* fix(cli): add throughput-based stall detection for slow-trickle streams (#774)

The existing gap-based stall detection only triggers when no chunks arrive
for >5s. Slow-trickle streams (e.g. 6 chars/sec) where tiny chunks arrive
every 2-4s never triggered "stalled". Add a rolling throughput window that
shows "slow (N chars/s)" when throughput drops below threshold (default
30 chars/sec) after an 8s warmup period.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): yield to event loop during token processing to unfreeze ticker (#775)

The thinking ticker task (asyncio background task updating every 0.5s) was
starved during slow streaming because the REPL event dispatch loop never
yielded between chunk processing. Add `await asyncio.sleep(0)` after each
token event in both REPL loops to let the ticker update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(services): downgrade stream timeout logs to debug, improve error message (#776)

Stream timeout WARNING log lines from ai_service leaked into the terminal
as raw text, stomping over the thinking ticker. These are redundant with
the structured error events already emitted. Downgrade to debug level.
Also improve the timeout error message to include elapsed time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore(cli): format renderer.py (#774)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(config): add stall_throughput_threshold to config reference (#774)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(config): parse stall_throughput_threshold from YAML config (#774)

The new config field was added to the CliConfig dataclass but never read
from cli_raw during config loading — users who set it in config.yaml
would be silently ignored. Add parsing with validation (clamped 0+), add
to config_validator known-fields allowlist and range checks, and pass to
the CliConfig constructor. Also switch throughput window from list to
collections.deque for O(1) popleft.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

feat: TradingClaws complete restructure - 5 phases implemented

Phase 1: Data Infrastructure
- DuckDB SQL query layer over Parquet files (duckdb_store.py)
- PIT quarterly factor snapshots (factor_snapshots.py)
- ParquetDataStore.query() delegates to DuckDB
- Trading costs: stamp tax 0.1%→0.05%, slippage 5→10bps
- CLI tool (tc data/screen/analyze/backtest)

Phase 2: Walk-Forward Backtest
- Rolling train/test window engine (walk_forward.py)
- Factor IC/ICIR validation in training windows
- TopK Dropout + tolerance band rebalancing (tolerance_bands.py)
- Reduces price factor churn from ~116 to ~30 trades

Phase 3: Parallel Analysis + MCP
- Concurrent multi-stock analysis via asyncio.Semaphore
- MCP server: analyze_stock, quant_screen, portfolio_status, update_data
- Nanobot config with Telegram/Feishu channels
- Nanobot skills (/analyze, /screen, /daily) + cron schedules

Phase 4: Paper Trading A/B Test
- ABTestTracker: Factor-only vs Agent-enhanced groups
- Agent decision logging with return backfill
- Weekly delta tracking

Phase 5: Web UI Dashboard
- Summary-first card layout with expand/collapse
- Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search
- Quick Stats + Today's Picks + Analysis Results
- TradingClaws branding

commit.message:
fix: Use thin .ts wrappers instead of .mjs keys in vercel.json

Vercel validates function patterns before build runs, so .mjs keys fail.
New approach: keep .ts keys, bundle to .mjs, then replace each .ts with
a thin re-export wrapper (`export { default } from './X.mjs'`). NFT
traces the wrapper and finds only one self-contained .mjs — no heavy
dependency tree to walk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace increment() with manual calculation for account locking

The increment() method may not sync the in-memory model attribute,
causing the >= 3 check to never trigger. This prevented account
locking notifications from being sent. Now uses the same reliable
pattern as LoginController (web).

commit.message:
Add Brick Breaker game with modern graphics and power-ups

- Canvas-based brick breaker with gradient bricks, glowing ball, particle effects
- 7+ rows of colored bricks with 2HP bricks on higher levels (crack overlay)
- Power-ups: Wide paddle (W), Multi-ball (3x), Slow ball (S)
- Ball trail effect, paddle shine, combo scoring system
- Frame-rate independent game loop (works on any refresh rate)
- ← → to move paddle, Space/Enter to launch ball

commit.message:
最初のコミット：READMEを追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: set spawnConfirmed immediately on TX success instead of polling

The reactive store path (useGameValue → Spawned) relies on async splice
resolution which can race with the poll timeout. Since the TX receipt
already confirms on-chain success, set spawnConfirmed=true immediately.

Also fixes if(result) → if(result?.success) since spawn() returns
{success: false} on revert which is still truthy.

Fix CI: remove dead tests, fix React 19 lint errors, clean unused imports

Backend:
- Remove test_scenarios.py (tests dead /api/scenarios routes)
- Remove test_surveys.py (tests dead /api/surveys routes, PhysicsEngine
  depends on missing geosim.scenarios.loader)
- Remove test_simulate_auto_saves_dataset from test_datasets.py (dead route)
- Add pytest.importorskip for geosim in test_anomalies.py and
  test_datasets_binary.py so they skip gracefully in CI
- Fix unused imports in test_anomalies.py

Frontend (0 lint errors, down from 28):
- useProgressiveGrid.ts: replace ref-in-render with useSyncExternalStore
- ProgressiveTerrain3D.tsx: same useSyncExternalStore pattern
- useReferenceLayerOverlay.ts: remove unused useState, ReferenceFeature
- useAuthFetch.ts: fix conditional hook call (always call useMsal)
- useDeviceGps.ts: restructure to avoid ref writes during render
- SignalTrace.tsx: use latest point timestamp instead of Date.now()
- AuthProvider.tsx, ImportDialog.tsx: suppress react-refresh for
  intentional non-component exports
- Remove unused imports across 7 files (THREE, getValueRange,
  useCallback, Upload, CompositeGrid, TmfSummary, etc.)

commit.message:
fix: профиль — удаляем пустые строки из payload перед отправкой на сервер

Пустые строки в integer-полях (employed_years, monthly_income_usd и др.)
вызывали 422 ошибку валидации. Теперь все пустые значения удаляются из
payload перед PATCH запросом.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add missing profile columns (company_desc and others)

The original migration only created 8 columns but the app uses 30+.
Most were added in the Supabase dashboard but company_desc was missed,
causing "Could not find column" error when saving profile.

Uses ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS so it's safe — existing columns are skipped.

Migration: 20260307000002_add_missing_profile_columns.sql

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

style(frontend): F29.1 - Meridian semantic color migration

- Replace all raw Tailwind colors with semantic tokens across 250 files
- text-emerald-* → text-success, bg-emerald-* → bg-success/N
- text-violet-* → text-ai-suggested, bg-violet-* → bg-ai-suggested/N
- text-amber-*/orange-* → text-warning, bg-amber-* → bg-warning/N
- text-blue-*/cyan-* → text-primary/text-info
- text-red-*/rose-* → text-destructive
- text-slate-*/gray-* → text-foreground or text-muted-foreground
- shadow-sm/md/lg → shadow-[var(--shadow-sm/md/lg)]
- 989 replacements in pass 1, 105 in pass 2, 15 manual fixes
- Playwright smoke gate: 106/106 passed
- Visual QA: 5/5 routes pass (correct semantic colors verified)
- Build: ✓ Compiled successfully

commit.message:
v3.9.11: Fix output device switching (fallback false positive + input channel loss)

- Route AudioSettings device changes through AudioEngine methods
  (setOutputDevice/setInputDevice/setAsioDevice) instead of direct
  deviceManager access, ensuring intentionalChange_ and desiredDevice_
  are properly set
- Preserve input channel bitmask when changing output device (JUCE
  resets inputChannels to 0 on WASAPI device pair recreation)
- Add setAsioDevice() for single-device ASIO setup with proper guards

commit.message:
fix(bot): use ASPx.EValueChanged API to fill order note fields

Instead of mouse.click + keyboard.type (which failed silently),
directly set el.value and call ASPx.EValueChanged(baseId) — the
same handler DevExpress wires to the onchange attribute of each
input/textarea. This is how the ERP registers field changes.

fix: prevent CD pipeline from failing when no frontend/backend changes

The CD pipeline was failing when only devcontainer or docs files were
modified because it waited for CI workflows that never ran due to
path filters. Now checks if frontend/backend files changed before
waiting for CI to complete.

Changes:
- Add check to detect if frontend/backend files were modified
- Skip CI wait if no code changes (e.g., devcontainer, docs)
- Proceed with Docker build for infrastructure-only changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use user timezone for past-time detection in event creation

Server runs in UTC, causing events at e.g. 13:00 MSK to be created
today instead of tomorrow when 13:00 MSK already passed (but 13:00 UTC
hadn't). Added _get_now(timezone) to local parser + safeguard in
_handle_create that shifts past times to tomorrow.
